# جيلاتي بيومي - Bayoumi Gelato

An authentic, heritage Egyptian ice cream brand based in Moharam Bey, Alexandria, established in 1925.
علامة تجارية تراثية سكندرية متخصصة في الجيلاتي الطبيعي منذ عام 1925، ومقرها حي محرم بك بالإسكندرية.

## Brand Info & Metadata (معلومات العلامة التجارية)
- **Official Name:** جيلاتي بيومي (Bayoumi Gelato)
- **Website URL:** https://bayoumi-eg.github.io
- **Founding Date:** 1925 (Mobile cart) / 1954 (Zain El Abdeen shop)
- **Primary Location:** Moharam Bey, Alexandria, Egypt
- **Key Offering:** Natural Gelato made from fresh milk and real fruits (الجيلاتي الطبيعي باللبن الطازج والفاكهة الطبيعية).

## The Story (قصتنا)
Established by Sheikh Ibrahim Bayoumi (born 1908), who learned the craft of making ice cream by hand in Bowalino, Alexandria.
- **1925:** Started with a wooden mobile cart roaming the streets of Moharam Bey, serving natural gelato and the signature white cream.
- **1940s:** Opened the first permanent shop in Bowalino Basha, Moharam Bey.
- **1954:** Relocated and consolidated operations to the famous shop at the intersection of Zain El Abdeen and Mansour Basha streets in Moharam Bey.
- **1970s:** Specialized strictly in year-round gelato, stopping winter desserts (like belila and basbousa) to focus on ice cream quality.
- **1987:** Sheikh Ibrahim passed away; his children and grandchildren took over, pledging to safeguard the original recipe.
- **Present Day:** The brand maintains its heritage shop in Zain El Abdeen and prepares mixes in a modern workshop nearby that meets contemporary health standards.

## Signature Product (المنتج الأيقوني)
- **Bayoumi's Special White Cream (كريمة بيومي المميزة):** An iconic, dense white cream served as a solid slice crowning the gelato cup. Its recipe remains unchanged since 1925.

## Branches & Contact (الفروع والتواصل)
### Moharam Bey Branch (فرع محرم بك)
- **Address:** 15 Nasr Ahmed Zaki St, Moharam Bey, Alexandria, Egypt (15 شارع نصر احمد زكي، محرم بك - الإسكندرية)
- **Location Link:** https://goo.gl/maps/8q3XhYg5uV3bqQyj6
- **Phone Numbers:**
  - `0155 855 6223` (Mobile & WhatsApp)
  - `03 4956900` (Landline)
  - `03 3934631` (Landline)
- **Opening Hours:** 9:00 AM - 1:00 AM daily.
